(3) The length of the red car is less than the length of the black car?

(2) assume for contradiction: the answer is no  [from question]
(3) The length of the red car is not less than the length of the black red car  [from steps 1, 2]
(4) The length of the red car equals 3 meters  [sentence 1]
(5) The length of the black red car equals 5 meters  [sentence 2]
(6) 3 Meters is not less than 5 meters  [from steps 3, 4, 5]
